hooks.command: for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do case "$f" in *.env|*.env.*|*auth.json|*credentials*|*secrets*) echo 'BLOCKED: Refusing to edit sensitive file: '"$f" >&2; exit 2;; esac; done

for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do case "$f" in *tauri-app/src-tauri/tests/fixtures/labels/*.json) echo 'WARN: editing GT label '"$f"' — labeled_regression_cli baseline will shift. Confirm intent.' >&2; exit 2;; esac; done
for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do if [[ "$f" == *.ts ]] || [[ "$f" == *.tsx ]]; then cd tauri-app && npx prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null; fi; done
for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do if [[ "$f" == *.rs ]]; then cd tauri-app/src-tauri && cargo fmt 2>/dev/null; fi; done
for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do if [[ "$f" == *.ts ]] || [[ "$f" == *.tsx ]]; then cd tauri-app && npx eslint "$f" --max-warnings 0 2>/dev/null; fi; done
for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do if [[ "$f" == *.rs ]]; then cd tauri-app/src-tauri && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings 2>/dev/null; break; fi; done
for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do if [[ "$f" == *.ts ]] || [[ "$f" == *.tsx ]]; then cd tauri-app && npx tsc --noEmit 2>/dev/null; break; fi; done

for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do case "$f" in *billing/rule_engine.rs|*billing/clinical_features.rs|*billing/ohip_codes.rs|*billing/diagnostic_codes.rs|*billing/time_tracking.rs|*billing/procedure_vocab.rs|*encounter_pipeline.rs) echo 'TIP: billing rule changed in '"$f"' — run: cd tauri-app/src-tauri && cargo run --bin labeled_regression_cli -- --all (and billing_experiment_cli --replay-only for prompt changes)' >&2; break;; esac; done
